name: find-paper
description: Find a specific academic paper by description, title keywords, or author name. Searches arXiv and returns full metadata including abstract, authors, and publication date.

tools.name: search_papers
tools.description: Search arXiv papers by keyword, author, category. Supports field prefixes (ti:, au:, cat:, abs:).

tools.name: get_paper
tools.description: Fetch full metadata for a specific paper by arXiv ID.

tools.name: get_citations
tools.description: Get citation count and top citing papers via Semantic Scholar.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Natural language description of the paper to find

syntheticQueries: find the attention is all you need paper
search for papers on RLHF
who wrote the LoRA paper
find recent diffusion model research
look up the original BERT paper
find the most cited paper on transformers
what's the paper about constitutional AI

name: author-papers
description: Find all papers by a specific author, optionally filtered by subject category. Returns a list of papers with titles, dates, and co-authors.

tools.name: search_by_author
tools.description: Find all papers by a specific author.

tools.name: search_papers
tools.description: Search arXiv papers by keyword, author, category.

syntheticQueries: what papers has Andrej Karpathy written
show me all papers by Yann LeCun
find Ilya Sutskever's publications
list Geoffrey Hinton's recent papers
papers by Fei-Fei Li in computer vision

name: recent-papers
description: Find the most recent papers in a specific arXiv category within a date window. Great for staying current on research trends.

tools.name: search_by_category
tools.description: Find papers in a subject category with optional date filtering.

tools.name: search_papers
tools.description: Search arXiv papers by keyword, author, category.

syntheticQueries: latest computer vision papers on arxiv
what's new in machine learning research this week
recent NLP papers from the last month
show me new reinforcement learning papers
trending papers in cs.AI this week

name: research
description: Open-ended web research agent. Browses the web, synthesizes information, and produces comprehensive research reports on any topic.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using Exa for high-quality results.

tools.name: browse_page
tools.description: Read and extract content from a webpage.

tools.name: write_report
tools.description: Produce a structured research report with citations.

syntheticQueries: research the latest developments in quantum computing
write a report on the state of AI regulation in Europe
investigate competitor pricing strategies
what are the trends in remote work 2025
deep dive into the current state of fusion energy
research best practices for LLM fine-tuning

name: browser-automation
description: Browser automation agent that can navigate websites, fill forms, click buttons, and extract data. Useful for web scraping, testing, and automated workflows.

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL in the browser.

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click an element on the page.

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type text into an input field.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page.

tools.name: extract_text
tools.description: Extract text content from the page.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Description of what to do in the browser

syntheticQueries: fill out the registration form on this website
scrape product prices from this e-commerce page
navigate to my dashboard and download the report
test the login flow on our staging site
extract all email addresses from this directory page

name: code-assistant
description: Full-featured coding environment with language servers, linters, and development tools. Can write, edit, debug, and test code across multiple languages.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write or overwrite a file.

tools.name: run_command
tools.description: Execute a shell command.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for patterns in the codebase.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run test suite and return results.

parameters.name: repository
parameters.description: Path or URL to the code repository

syntheticQueries: fix the failing tests in the auth module
refactor the database layer to use connection pooling
add input validation to the API endpoints
write unit tests for the payment service
debug the memory leak in the worker process

name: triage-issues
description: Triage GitHub issues by analyzing content, applying labels, assigning priority, and routing to the right team member.

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List open issues with optional filters.

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get detailed issue information.

tools.name: add_labels
tools.description: Add labels to an issue.

tools.name: assign_issue
tools.description: Assign issue to a user.

syntheticQueries: label all new github issues
triage the bug reports from this week
assign unassigned issues to the right team
categorize open issues by severity
find duplicate issues and link them

name: review-pull-request
description: Review pull requests for code quality, potential bugs, security issues, and adherence to coding standards. Provides inline comments and an overall review summary.

tools.name: get_pr
tools.description: Get pull request details and diff.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List changed files in the PR.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a review comment on a specific line.

tools.name: submit_review
tools.description: Submit the review with approval or changes requested.

syntheticQueries: review the latest pull request on our repo
check this PR for security vulnerabilities
review code quality in PR #42
look for performance issues in the pending PRs
review the frontend refactor pull request

name: diagnose-error
description: Investigate Sentry error reports. Analyze stack traces, identify root causes, check error frequency and affected users.

tools.name: list_errors
tools.description: List recent Sentry errors with frequency data.

tools.name: get_error_details
tools.description: Get full error details and stack trace.

tools.name: get_error_frequency
tools.description: Get error occurrence frequency over time.

syntheticQueries: why are we getting null pointer errors in production
investigate the most frequent error this week
diagnose the checkout page crash
what's causing the 500 errors on the API
how many users are affected by the login bug

name: query-database
description: Query and analyze data from SQL databases. Generate queries, run them, and interpret results. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite.

tools.name: run_query
tools.description: Execute a SQL query and return results.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List available tables and views.

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Get table schema with column types.

parameters.name: question
parameters.description: Natural language question about the data

syntheticQueries: how many signups did we get last month
query the revenue data for Q3
find all users who churned in the last 30 days
what's the average order value by country
show me the top 10 customers by lifetime value

name: summarize-channel
description: Summarize Slack channel conversations. Extract key decisions, action items, and important mentions from any time period.

tools.name: read_channel
tools.description: Read messages from a Slack channel.

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search across all channels for specific topics.

syntheticQueries: summarize what happened in #engineering today
what decisions were made in the product meeting
find action items from this week's standups
what did the team discuss about the launch
catch me up on #general from the past 3 days

name: draft-email
description: Draft professional emails based on context and instructions. Can handle cold outreach, follow-ups, internal communications, and customer responses.

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search for contacts by name or company.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Get the email thread for context.

tools.name: draft_email
tools.description: Create a draft email.

syntheticQueries: draft a follow-up email to the investor
write a cold outreach email to potential customers
compose a response to the client's feature request
draft an internal announcement about the new policy
write a thank you email after the interview

name: check-deployment
description: Monitor and manage CI/CD deployments. Check pipeline status, view logs, trigger rollbacks, and verify deployment health.

tools.name: get_pipeline_status
tools.description: Get current pipeline status and stage details.

tools.name: get_deploy_logs
tools.description: Fetch deployment logs for a specific run.

tools.name: trigger_rollback
tools.description: Rollback to a previous deployment.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Run health checks against deployed services.

syntheticQueries: what's the status of the latest deployment
check if the production deploy succeeded
show me the deploy logs for the API service
rollback the frontend to the previous version
is the staging environment healthy

name: kubernetes-ops
description: Manage Kubernetes clusters. List pods, check logs, scale deployments, and troubleshoot cluster issues.

tools.name: get_pods
tools.description: List pods with status and resource usage.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Fetch logs from a pod or container.

tools.name: scale_deployment
tools.description: Scale a deployment to N replicas.

tools.name: describe_resource
tools.description: Get detailed info about any K8s resource.

syntheticQueries: why are pods crashing in production
scale the API deployment to 5 replicas
check resource usage across the cluster
show me logs from the failing pod
list all pods in the staging namespace

name: create-visualization
description: Create data visualizations and dashboards from CSV, JSON, or database sources. Generates charts, graphs, and interactive reports.

tools.name: load_data
tools.description: Load data from CSV, JSON, or database.

tools.name: create_chart
tools.description: Generate a chart (bar, line, scatter, pie, etc.).

tools.name: create_dashboard
tools.description: Compose multiple charts into a dashboard.

parameters.name: data_source
parameters.description: Path or URL to the data source

syntheticQueries: create a revenue chart from this CSV
visualize user growth over the past year
build a dashboard showing key metrics
plot the correlation between features
make a pie chart of traffic sources

name: schedule-meeting
description: Manage calendar events. Find available time slots, schedule meetings, send invites, and handle rescheduling across multiple attendees.

tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Check availability for one or more people.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event with attendees.

tools.name: reschedule_event
tools.description: Move an existing event to a new time.

syntheticQueries: schedule a 30-minute meeting with the design team
find a time that works for everyone next week
reschedule the standup to 10am
book a meeting room for the all-hands
when is everyone free for a sync this afternoon

name: search-files
description: Search and manage local files. Find files by name, content, or metadata. Organize, rename, and batch-process files across directories.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search files by name pattern or content.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read file contents.

tools.name: move_files
tools.description: Move or rename files.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List directory contents with metadata.

syntheticQueries: find all PDF files in my downloads folder
search for files containing 'API_KEY'
organize my desktop files into folders by type
find the largest files on my drive
locate all config files in this project

name: test-api
description: Test REST and GraphQL APIs. Send requests, validate responses, check status codes, and run automated test suites against endpoints.

tools.name: send_request
tools.description: Send an HTTP request (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE).

tools.name: validate_response
tools.description: Validate response against a schema.

tools.name: run_test_suite
tools.description: Run a collection of API tests.

syntheticQueries: test the user registration endpoint
check if the payment API is returning correct responses
run the full API test suite against staging
test the GraphQL mutations for the order flow
verify the authentication endpoints handle edge cases

name: write-documentation
description: Generate technical documentation from code. Create API docs, README files, architecture guides, and inline code documentation.

tools.name: analyze_code
tools.description: Analyze code structure and extract documentation targets.

tools.name: generate_docs
tools.description: Generate documentation in markdown format.

tools.name: update_readme
tools.description: Update or create a README file.

parameters.name: source_path
parameters.description: Path to the code to document

syntheticQueries: generate API documentation for our REST endpoints
write a README for this project
create an architecture decision record
document the authentication flow
update the API docs with the new endpoints

name: monitor-metrics
description: Monitor application metrics and set up alerts. Track response times, error rates, throughput, and resource utilization from Datadog, Grafana, or CloudWatch.

tools.name: query_metrics
tools.description: Query time-series metrics data.

tools.name: create_alert
tools.description: Create an alert rule for a metric.

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Retrieve dashboard data and charts.

syntheticQueries: what's the p99 latency for the API right now
set up an alert if error rate exceeds 5%
show me the CPU usage trend for the past hour
are there any anomalies in our response times
check the memory usage of the worker services
